title: onobrychis cilicica
intro: Onobrychis cilicica, also known as Anatolian bird's foot trefoil, is a flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis cilicica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
